name: Luyan Pharma Co.,Ltd.
summary: Luyan Pharma Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of human health products in China. It also operates pharmaceutical distribution and retail direct stores. The company was formerly known as Luyan (Fujian) Pharma Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Luyan Pharma Co.,Ltd. in June 2016. Luyan Pharma Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.
